summary: Phase 2 testing complete - Billing, Trial, Onboarding, Journey Tracking. All 24 backend API tests passed. Frontend pricing page, subscription page, onboarding page, and sidebar links all working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: All Phase 2 APIs working correctly with proper authentication middleware using GetTenantID()
In-memory repositories correctly seed demo data for plans (5), coupons (NEXO20, PRIMEIRO), subscription (Pro trial), and onboarding progress (2/5 steps completed)
Trial WhatsApp verification generates wa.me URL correctly (no actual WhatsApp integration - returns URL only)
Sidebar correctly updated with 'Minha Assinatura' (Crown icon) and 'Onboarding' (Compass icon) links under SISTEMA section
Pricing page correctly shows all 5 plans with pricing toggle (monthly/yearly -17%) and coupon validation
Onboarding page shows 5 steps with progress bar, completion states, and reward indicators

success_rate.frontend: 100% - Pricing, Subscription, Onboarding pages all working

seed_data_creation: Used existing demo tenant with seeded data (Pro trial, 5 days remaining, 2/5 onboarding steps)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 fully tested. All billing/trial/onboarding/journey APIs functional. Demo tenant subscription may show 'Business' status after test runs change-plan API. Onboarding progress shows 60% (3/5 steps) after test completes invite_team step. WhatsApp verification is MOCKED - returns wa.me URL but doesn't send actual messages.

tested_features.GET /api/billing/plans: PASS - Returns 5 plans (micro $49, starter $99, pro $199, business $399, enterprise $999)
tested_features.POST /api/billing/coupon/validate: PASS - NEXO20 returns 20% discount, INVALID returns 400
tested_features.GET /api/v1/billing/subscription: PASS - Returns Pro trial with 5 days remaining, usage data
tested_features.POST /api/v1/billing/convert: PASS - Converts trial to active subscription
tested_features.POST /api/auth/verify/start: PASS - Returns whatsapp_url for verification (MOCKED - no actual message sent)
tested_features.POST /api/auth/verify/confirm: PASS - Validates code (expired/invalid returns proper errors)
tested_features.GET /api/v1/onboarding/steps: PASS - Returns 5 steps for mechanic business type
tested_features.GET /api/v1/onboarding/progress: PASS - Returns 40% progress (2/5 completed: company_info, first_os)
tested_features.dashboard: PASS - Loads with all KPIs and charts
tested_features.pricing_page: PASS - Shows 5 plan cards, monthly/yearly toggle, coupon input with validation
tested_features.subscription_page: PASS - Shows plan details, usage bars, action buttons
tested_features.onboarding_page: PASS - Shows 5 steps, progress bar at 60%, completion states
tested_features.sidebar_links: PASS - 'Minha Assinatura' and 'Onboarding' links in SISTEMA section

mocked_apis.whatsapp_verification: Trial WhatsApp verification generates code but doesn't send actual message - returns wa.me URL only
